## Testing

Describe how you tested this change:

- [ ] `make clean && make` — builds with no errors or warnings
- [ ] `./neodax -x /bin/ls` — standard analysis passes
- [ ] Tested against the relevant binary type (ELF/PE, stripped/debug, x86/ARM64)
- [ ] JS addon builds and `node js/examples/06_full_analysis.js /bin/ls` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] No inline code comments added
- [ ] Code follows the C99 style in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (for features and bug fixes)
- [ ] Documentation updated if new flags or APIs were added
- [ ] No external dependencies introduced
